sglang.title: Add support for OpenAI API parallel sampling
sglang.author: yichuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add support for OpenAI API parallel sampling:

add support for request.n>1 when using OpenAI API ; First send one prefilling request to increase cache hit rate, then async send n decoding request in parallel
Do not support when there are m prompts organized as a List in OpenAI API
Do not support req

sglang.title: Update OpenAI API
sglang.author: wisclmy0611
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This PR moves all OpenAI files into a separate folder.

vllm.title: [BUGFIX] Raise an error for no draft token case when draft_tp>1
vllm.author: wooyeonlee0
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a simple patch to raise an error to prevent users from hitting the hang error stated in #5814.
This error happens only when the skip speculation feature is activated and there are no generated draft tokens for "all" sequences in a step, and draft_tp > 1.
We may revisit this issue later

vllm.title: [Model] RowParallelLinear: pass bias to quant_method.apply
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I think for TP=1 case we can pass the bias to the apply function, which should lead to more use of the fused CUTLASS kernels.
cc @tlrmchlsmth @cyang49
Update: this is now implemented for TP>1 too

vllm.title: [Bugfix] [SpecDecode] AsyncMetricsCollector: update time since last collection
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #6577
IDK if I misunderstood something here, but looks like we basically sync the metrics every time (unless one is in-flight) and don't respect the collect_interval_s after the very first collection.
cc @cadedaniel @njhill

vllm.title: [Core] Allow specifying custom Executor
vllm.author: Yard1

This PR allows the user to pass in their custom Executor and TokenizerGroup classes if they so desire. This allows easy experimentation and customized deployments.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Core]: Guard for KeyErrors that can occur if a request is aborted with Pipeline Parallel
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a quick and dirty solution to #6586 wherein a vLLM server running a model with pipeline parallel can crash if streaming requests are aborted during the processing.
FIX #6586
